channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Swimming venues
channel.description: Latest swimming venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Manta Kids Pattaya
item.description: Premier kids swim academy. Head coach is former Thai national swimmer. ASCTA-certified instructors. ฿9,900/quarter (10 sessions).

item.title: Wong Amat Beach — Naklua / Pattaya's Family Swimming Beach
item.description: Pattaya quietest, cleanest, most family-friendly main beach. ~1.5km long Naklua coastline with safe-swim zone, beach volleyball court, jet ski + banana boat (central section). Walking distance to Centara Grand Mirage, Cape Dara, and Sanctuary of Truth. Free.

item.title: First Serve Sports Club (Swimming)
item.description: Swim teaching by Swimming Association of Thailand-trained instructors. All ages, English or Thai.

item.title: Hard Rock Hotel Pool (Day Pass)
item.description: World-famous free-form pool with artificial beach. Day pass option.

item.title: Naklua Public Swimming Pool
item.description: One of two public swimming pools in Pattaya. Naklua location.

item.title: Jomtien Public Swimming Pool
item.description: One of two public swimming pools in Pattaya. South Pattaya / Jomtien border.

item.title: Cartoon Network Amazone / Columbia Pictures Aquaverse
item.description: World first themed waterpark. 18 slides across 3 zones. Polin Waterparks hardware. Rebranded 2022 to Sony Pictures IPs. 15km south of Pattaya.

item.title: Ramayana Water Park
item.description: Largest water park in Thailand and Southeast Asia. 184,000 sqm. 26 slides / 34 lanes. 600m lazy river around natural hill. Double wave pool with 150m beach. TripAdvisor 2019 #1 Asia / #10 World.

item.title: Centara Grand Mirage Beach Resort
item.description: 5-star Lost World themed family resort. On-site water park + 230m private beach + Spa Cenvaree (24 rooms) + rock climbing wall + 2 tennis + Pilates/aqua/kayaking.
